name: dwg2dxf-converter
description: Convert DWG files to DXF using Node.js, 100% standalone via WebAssembly and GNU LibreDWG.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('wasm/libredwg.wasm')) { console.error('Build required avant publication !'); process.exit(1); }"

author: JosephESSEY
